manual_checks.title: The target system and hosting path for www.frawo-tech.de are explicitly decided and verified
The public website content is the intended GbR release content
Apex and www browser behavior are visibly verified for the website release scope
manual_checks.evidence: Gemini browser check: apex and www HTTP show STRATO placeholder page without redirect; apex and www HTTPS show ERR_SSL_PROTOCOL_ERROR; no public GbR content visible.

manual_checks.title: Public release mail model for webmaster, franz, info and noreply is verified
The chosen public TLS automation path is configured and documented
SPF, DKIM and DMARC are all intentionally configured for public release
Rollback for DNS, TLS and host-switch is complete and usable

blocked_reasons: critical website Codex check not green: public-http-redirect-check=failed
critical website Codex check not green: public-https-check=failed
critical website Codex check not green: public-mail-dns-check=failed
critical website manual evidence not green: website_target_system_verified=pending
critical website manual evidence not green: website_content_verified=pending
critical website manual evidence not green: public_browser_acceptance_verified=failed
critical website manual evidence not green: public_mail_model_verified=pending
critical website manual evidence not green: tls_automation_verified=pending
critical website manual evidence not green: spf_dkim_dmarc_verified=pending
critical website manual evidence not green: rollback_runbook_verified=pending
scope_note: This gate covers the public website release track only. It is separate from the internal business MVP gate and from full internal certification.
